**表3 (Table 3)**

回帰式における要約結果 (Summary Results in the Regressions)

$$ R_{pt} = \hat{\gamma}_{0t} + \hat{\gamma}_{1t}\hat{\beta}_{p,t-1} + \hat{\gamma}_{2t}\hat{\beta}_{p,t-1}^2 + \hat{\gamma}_{3t}\bar{s}_{p,t-1}(\tilde{r}_i) + \tilde{\eta}_{pt} $$

パネルA (Panel A)
